title: Track Macros in 3 Seconds
setting: Dark premium kitchen environment with matte black surfaces, consistent violet ambient glow from background LEDs, warm overhead spotlight, shallow depth of field, same camera height and framing throughout

scenes.prompt: Frustrated person scrolling through endless food database on phone in dimly lit kitchen, overwhelmed expression, moody lighting with violet shadows, cinematic close-up of phone screen showing long list, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Still searching every single food in your calorie app?

scenes.prompt: Hand holding phone taking photo of a colorful healthy meal on dark plate, camera flash illuminating food, premium dark kitchen background, violet ambient glow, overhead angle, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: With Cals2Gains, just take a photo of your plate.

scenes.prompt: Sleek dark-themed app interface showing AI analyzing food with glowing scan lines, macro breakdown appearing with animated numbers, violet and coral UI accents, futuristic holographic effect, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Our AI identifies every ingredient, estimates portions, and calculates exact macros.

scenes.prompt: Split screen comparison: left side shows timer counting 15 minutes with frustrated person, right side shows 3-second counter with happy person, dark premium aesthetic, violet neon divider, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Fifteen minutes of manual searching... or three seconds with AI. You choose.

scenes.prompt: Confident person enjoying their meal while phone shows tracked macros on dark premium app, warm coral lighting, relaxed lifestyle vibe, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Download Cals2Gains free. Link in bio. Your macros in three seconds.
